description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On November 10, 2025 at 9:21 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on Stanyan Street near Paramount Terrace.  
 
The Waymo AV was parked at the curb facing south on Stanyan Street when a passenger car traveling southbound on Stanyan Street 
proceeded to parallel park at the curb directly behind the Waymo AV. While the passenger car was parking, the passenger car proceeded 
forward and the front of the passenger car made contact with the rear of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 
4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
